title: MS / MD Jobs 2026 – Medical Specialists
shortInfo: Dantewada District Hospital Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of Medical Specialists. Candidates with MD/DNB Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Dantewada District Hospital official website dantewada.nic.in.

basic_details.job_title: Dantewada District Hospital Medical Specialists Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Dantewada District Hospital Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of Medical Specialists. Candidates with MD/DNB Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Dantewada District Hospital official website dantewada.nic.in.

application_fee.details: Please refer to the official notification for Age Limit details.

age_limit.maximum_age: Please refer to the official notification for Age Limit details.
age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for Age Limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for Age Limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: MD/DNB in Paediatrics, MD/DNB in Gynecology, MD/DNB in Anesthesia, MD/DNB in Orthopedics, MD/DNB in Radiodiagnosis/Radiology
qualification.details: Pediatrician: MD/DNB in Paediatrics with live registration in CGMC, experience certificate if any. Gynecologist: MD/DNB in Gynecology with live registration in CGMC, experience certificate if any. Anesthetist: MD/DNB in Anesthesia with live registration in CGMC, experience certificate if any. Orthopedic Surgeon: MD/DNB in Orthopedics with live registration in CGMC, experience certificate if any. Radiologist: MD/DNB in Radiodiagnosis/Radiology with live registration in CGMC, experience certificate if any.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Dantewada District Hospital to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for Dantewada District Hospital Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Medical Specialists posts is 29th May 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for Medical Specialists?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Medical Specialists announced by Dantewada District Hospital. These vacancies are distributed across various specializations as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Dantewada District Hospital Medical Specialists recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website or the provided application link to submit their forms.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Medical Specialists positions ranges from Rs. 3,00,000/- to Rs. 4,00,000/- per month, depending on the specialization and negotiation. This is a competitive salary for contract-based government jobs.

faq.question: What are the required qualifications for the Medical Specialists posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MD/DNB degree in the respective specialization such as Paediatrics, Gynecology, Anesthesia, Orthopedics, or Radiodiagnosis/Radiology, along with live registration in CGMC.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for Dantewada District Hospital Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, as per the official notification, there is no application fee required for candidates applying under any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Medical Specialists posts will be based on a Virtual Interview. Candidates shortlisted after the initial screening will be called for the interview.

faq.question: What is the job type for these vacancies?
faq.answer: The positions of Medical Specialists at Dantewada District Hospital are on a contract basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The direct link to download the official notification PDF for Dantewada District Hospital Recruitment 2026 is available in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly.

faq.question: What is the walk-in date mentioned in the notification?
faq.answer: The walk-in date mentioned in the notification is 29th May 2026. However, the application mode is online, so candidates should focus on submitting their applications online by the last date.
